former: A dusty old royal portrait in an ornate golden frame leaning in a dark attic
free: A bird flying out of an open golden cage into the dark night sky
frequent: A dark night sky streaked with many repeated golden shooting stars
full: A crystal glass filled to the very brim with golden liquid, one drop overflowing, dark background
fundamental: A massive glowing golden cornerstone at the base of a dark great stone wall
general: A wide aerial view of a dark city grid glowing with uniform golden lights
generous: Hands offering an overflowing bowl of golden coins to another pair of open hands, dark background
genuine: A raw genuine gold nugget on dark stone with a jeweler's loupe beside it, warm light
global: The dark Earth seen from space with golden city lights and glowing connection arcs
good: A perfect shining golden apple with a single leaf on a black background
grateful: Hands pressed together in thanks over a warm golden light, dark background
great: A majestic golden mountain peak towering above dark clouds at night
half: A golden sphere split perfectly in half on black marble, one half hollow
hard: A dark iron anvil at the moment of a golden hammer strike, sparks flying
healthy: A runner silhouetted against golden dawn light on a dark hill, energetic stride
heavy: A massive dark iron ball with chain, the stone floor cracking beneath it, golden rim light
high: A golden eagle soaring far above jagged dark mountain peaks
historical: Old parchment maps and a brass telescope in a dark study lit by golden candlelight
huge: A giant dark elephant towering over a tiny human silhouette at golden dusk
ill: A pale person resting in a dark bedroom under blankets, warm golden bedside lamp
illegal: A briefcase exchanging hands between shadowy figures in a dark alley under a golden streetlight
important: A golden crown on a dark stone pedestal under a single dramatic spotlight
impossible: An impossible Escher-style staircase looping in dark stone with glowing golden edges
impressive: A grand opera hall with towering golden chandeliers above dark velvet seats
independent: A single golden lion standing alone on a dark cliff edge under the night sky
individual: A single human fingerprint glowing golden on dark glass
inevitable: Giant golden dominoes captured mid-fall in an unstoppable chain on a dark surface
initial: A golden seed sprouting its very first shoot from dark soil, macro
innocent: A peaceful sleeping baby wrapped in a soft blanket, warm golden light, dark room
intellectual: A dark study with golden-lit bookshelves, a chess board and round spectacles on an open book
interested: A wide-eyed child leaning forward to examine a glowing golden butterfly in the dark
interesting: An intricate golden puzzle box half open and glowing from inside, dark background
internal: A cutaway pocket watch revealing its glowing golden clockwork mechanism inside, dark
international: A dark carved wooden world map with golden routes connecting the continents
involved: Many golden threads interwoven between dark hands, intricate weaving
keen: A focused archer drawing a golden bow at night, eyes locked on target, dark background
kind: A hand holding a golden umbrella over a small wet kitten in dark rain
known: An open dark book with one golden glowing bookmarked page in a dim library
large: A vast dark cargo ship beside a tiny rowboat, golden port lights at night
last: The final golden autumn leaf hanging on a bare dark branch
late: A dark clock tower at midnight with a golden glowing face, full moon high
left: A forked dark forest road at night with the left path glowing golden
light: Golden balloons lifting gently into the dark night sky
likely: Two golden dice captured mid-roll above dark casino felt
limited: A small golden slice of cake remaining alone on a large dark plate
literary: A dark writing desk with a quill pen, golden ink pot and stacked classic books in candlelight
little: A tiny golden mouse standing beside a huge dark leather boot
local: A warm golden-lit corner bakery on a dark old town street at night
lonely: A single empty bench under one golden streetlamp in an empty dark park
long: An endless dark railway track stretching straight to the golden horizon
